_purpose: Per-series adequacy block to be merged into Technical/series_registry.json by the main thread after Wave 2 closeout.

issues_resolved: IMF IFS primary URL reachable HTTP 200
AMECO backfill URL substitution recorded (404 -> active path)
China S1101-E inclusion decision: KEEP as flagged comparator (cd2_addition: true)
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: cell-by-cell validation of all 15 countries' X/M ratios against Appendix11_XMData.xlsx (CD2 cross-checked only US)

S1101-E.rationale: Not in Shaikh's 15-country panel; preserved as analyst-added comparator.

issues_resolved: BLS ICHCC discontinuation diagnosed; canonical substitute (BIS PPI EER) selected with Concept Match Justification
BLS ICHCC URL substitution recorded (403 -> /ilc/ archival landing 200)
issues_outstanding: Phase 5 loader: rebase BIS PPI EER from 2010=100 to 2002=100; splice against Appendix11_USJPNdata.xlsx 'rxr1' at 1994-2009 overlap
Phase 6: write Concept Match Justification block in EPR for BIS substitution

S1102.proxy_justification: Post-2013 extension uses BIS PPI-based REER broad index in lieu of Shaikh's bespoke REER from BLS ILC Tables 9+11. Both measure trade-weighted multilateral PPI-deflated real exchange rate. Differences (BIS ~60 partner countries rolling 3-yr weights vs Shaikh 19-country static IFS-X+M weights; base year 2010 vs 2002) documented and accepted as concept match per anu-framework Concept Match Justification standard.

issues_resolved: Construction reclassification ratified: `direct` -> `formula` (REER/RULC ratio); enforces No Lazy Splices on extension
BLS ILC discontinuation diagnosed; dual-path substitution canonicalized (OECD ULC open + Conference Board ILC hi-fi)
issues_outstanding: Phase 5: emit two variants S1103_open (OECD ULC denominator) and S1103_hifi (Conference Board ULC denominator)
Phase 6: coordinate S1102 and S1103 substitution narratives (shared BIS PPI EER numerator)

S1103.proxy_justification: Inherits S1102 BIS PPI EER substitution for the numerator. Denominator ULC substituted by OECD ULC_QUA (open-license, whole-economy ISIC A-T; Shaikh used manufacturing-only — partial concept gap documented) and/or Conference Board ILC (hi-fi, licensed, direct BLS ILC successor). Concept Match Justification written per substitute.

issues_resolved: Trade-balance units diagnosed: (X-M)/(X+M) net-trade ratio, NOT X/M (confirmed by CD2 negative sample values)
RelGDPR source identified: OECD QNA primary, WDI per-country backfill
EU12 composition decision: hold pre-1995 12-member basket fixed via per-country backfill
BLS ICHCC URL substitution recorded for S1104-B REER component
issues_outstanding: Dossier formula field MUST be revised to (X-M)/(X+M) before Phase 5 loader execution
Workbook column identification for S1104-A — dossier says 'column F (rulcadjratio1 / trade balance column)' which is ambiguous; Phase 5 loader QA must clarify
EU12 backfill effort: 12 country-level real GDP series 1960-1995 from OECD QNA or WDI

url_substitutions.rationale: Old AMECO path returns HTTP 404; database migrated to economy-finance.ec.europa.eu subdomain. Verified HTTP 200 on 2026-05-18.

BLS ICHCC page returns HTTP 403 (discontinued 2013, no archival serving). BLS retains /fls/ and /ilc/ directories as archival landing pages — HTTP 200 verified 2026-05-18. Underlying data extension handled via BIS/OECD/Conference Board substitutions (see data_substitutions).

data_substitutions.concept: Real Effective Exchange Rate (PPI-deflated, multilateral, trade-weighted)
data_substitutions.discontinued_source: BLS ILC Tables 9 + 11 combined into bespoke REER per Shaikh & Antonopoulos 2012

canonical_substitute.source: BIS Real Effective Exchange Rate, PPI-based, broad index
canonical_substitute.units: Index (2010=100; rebaseable to 2002=100 via overlap arithmetic)

data_substitutions.concept_match_justification: Both are trade-weighted multilateral real exchange rates deflated by producer prices. BIS broad index uses ~60 partner countries with rolling 3-yr trade weights vs Shaikh's static 19-country basket weighted by IFS X+M. Same economic concept (PPI-deflated REER); weight-basket differences documented and accepted.

canonical_substitute_open.concept_match_justification: OECD ULC_QUA is whole-economy (ISIC A-T) vs Shaikh's manufacturing-only basis. Partial concept gap acknowledged; flagged as `proxy: true` with sectoral-narrowing note. Open-license; ships with replication package.

canonical_substitute_hifi.source: The Conference Board International Labor Comparisons
canonical_substitute_hifi.concept_match_justification: Conference Board ILC is the explicit successor program to BLS ILC with documented method-continuity report. Direct concept match (manufacturing ULC, internationally comparable). Preferred for high-fidelity replication when licensed access available.

data_substitutions.concept: EU12 real GDP aggregate (Shaikh's pre-1995 EU member basket)
data_substitutions.discontinued_source: EU12 aggregate not formally discontinued; ceased as published statistical entity with 1995 EU expansion

canonical_substitute.source: OECD Quarterly National Accounts (QNA) with per-country backfill from World Bank WDI
canonical_substitute.units: Real GDP in constant USD; aggregated as sum across BE, DK, FR, DE, GR, IE, IT, LU, NL, PT, ES, GB

data_substitutions.concept_match_justification: Hold Shaikh's pre-1995 EU12 basket fixed by backfilling each of the 12 members. Aggregate as real GDP sum in constant USD. Concept-exact match to Shaikh's intent. Euro Area aggregate offered as alternative with documented composition break.

construction_corrections.new_value: Trade balance net-ratio_{c,t} = (X_{c,t} - M_{c,t}) / (X_{c,t} + M_{c,t}); REER as S1102-B; Relative real GDP as US/EU12 ratio of real-GDP-indices both rebased 2002=100
construction_corrections.rationale: CD2 sample values are negative (1960=-0.606, 2008=-0.533), inconsistent with X/M ratio which is strictly positive. (X-M)/(X+M) net-trade ratio is the only construction consistent with the negative-to-positive sign pattern observed in CD2 samples. Shaikh's authorial choice differs from S1101 (X/M); within-chapter inconsistency preserved as documented.

Phase 3 reclassification ratified. S1103 = rxr1 / rulcadjratio1rescaled; per anu-framework No Lazy Splices rule, extension MUST recompute the ratio from re-extended numerator (BIS PPI EER) and denominator (OECD/Conference Board ULC adjusted), NOT splice the ratio itself.
